title: Tick Control in Piscataway, NJ | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Piscataway, NJ starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease with expert tick extermination. Call today!
intro: Piscataway residents face increasing tick populations due to the township's abundant green spaces and proximity to wooded areas along the Raritan River. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from dangerous tick-borne diseases like Lyme disease and Rocky Mountain spotted fever. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick treatment solutions for Piscataway homes and properties starting at just $125.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Piscataway and surrounding New Jersey communities with EPA-approved tick treatments that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the unique tick challenges in Middlesex County and provide customized solutions with guaranteed results and free follow-up inspections.
localContext: Piscataway's parks like Johnson Park and Possumtown Historic Site, along with residential areas near Rutgers University, create ideal habitats for deer ticks and dog ticks. Our team is familiar with treating properties throughout Piscataway's diverse neighborhoods, from historic homes near the Metlars-Bodine House to modern developments along Stelton Road.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Piscataway?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Piscataway range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for your specific needs, with seasonal treatment packages available for ongoing protection.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Piscataway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Piscataway from April through October, with peak activity during the warm, humid months of May through August. However, ticks can remain active during mild winters, so year-round vigilance is important, especially if your property borders wooded areas or has tall grass.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We recommend keeping pets and family members inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until the treatment dries completely. All our products are specifically chosen for residential safety.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Our barrier sprays eliminate existing ticks on contact and provide residual protection for 3-4 weeks. For comprehensive protection throughout tick season, we recommend treatments every 4-6 weeks, especially for properties near Johnson Park or other wooded areas in Piscataway.
